HoverToShowCombined.Desc: Only cycle through colors when hovering over a combined flower stack.
CombineOnOrganize.Desc: Combine all flowers when pressing the Organize button.
AppendCombinedNumberToName.Desc: Show the number of different colors after a combined stack's name.
FixSliderBar.Desc: Fix a vanilla bug not letting slider bars reach 100.
FixWhiteFlowerDrawing.Desc: Fix a vanilla bug not drawing white flowers.
